goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'cheap' price range and should have 'a star of 2'.
The hotel should be in the type of 'hotel'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the 'moderate' price range.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 08:30' and should depart from 'ely'.
The train should leave on 'sunday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'arrival time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the cheap price range and should have a star of 2
The hotel should be in the type of hotel
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the moderate price range
Make sure you get phone number
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave after 08:30 and should depart from ely
The train should leave on sunday and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get travel time and arrival time
